sentences.arabic: النَّثْرُ الْأَدَبِيُّ هُوَ فَنُّ الْكِتَابَةِ بِدُونِ وَزْنٍ أَوْ قَافِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Književna proza je umjetnost pisanja bez metra ili rime.
sentences.translationEn: Literary prose is the art of writing without meter or rhyme.

sentences.translation: Pisci koriste metafore kako bi pojasnili značenja.
sentences.translationEn: Writers use metaphors to clarify meanings.

sentences.arabic: مَثَلًا، يَقُولُ الْكَاتِبُ "الْعِلْمُ نُورٌ" لِيُبَيِّنَ أَهَمِّيَّةَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na primjer, pisac kaže "znanje je svjetlost" da bi pokazao važnost spoznaje.
sentences.translationEn: For example, a writer says "knowledge is light" to show the importance of knowledge.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الصُّوَرُ الْبَيَانِيَّةُ تَجْعَلُ النَّصَّ أَكْثَرَ جَمَالًا.
sentences.translation: Ove slikovite figure čine tekst ljepšim.
sentences.translationEn: These figurative images make the text more beautiful.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَشْعُرُ بِالْمَشَاعِرِ الْقَوِيَّةِ عِنْدَمَا نَقْرَأُ هَذِهِ الْجُمَلَ.
sentences.translation: Osjećamo snažne emocije kada čitamo ove rečenice.
sentences.translationEn: We feel strong emotions when we read these sentences.
